calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Alexander Golovets; Law Offices of Alexander Golovets; 415-562-7151; appearing on behalf of defendant Remedly, Inc.
Mark J. Seifert; Seifert Zuromski LLP; 415-999-0901; appearing on behalf of plaintiff 3Degrees Group, Inc.

Defendant contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT is DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default
Off Calendar Oct-28-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default is continued to November 28, 2022 for parties to provide courtesy copies of their filings in support of and in opposition to the motion no later than November 10, 2022 with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date. (Moving papers received). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default
Off Calendar Oct-14-2022 Continued To Oct-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT REMEDLY, INC.'s Motion For Relief From Default.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on October 28, 2022. That department handles all landlord/tenant cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/VP)
